description: State document, in Arabic script. Probably a report, petition, or recommendation from Ṭalḥa al-Qibṭī to a dignitary, probably in Cairo. Dating: Probably Ayyubid-era or later, based on hand and formulary. Not addressed to the caliph (as Baker and Polliack suggest) but merely to a dignitary. The addressee is asked to look after the bearer ʿUthmān al-[...] and three other men and all of their companions, and "not to abandon them to the Miṣrīs (either Egyptians or people of Fustat)." On verso, there are jottings and possibly a draft of another petition. Needs further examination. (Information in part from Baker & Polliack Catalogue.)
description_he: מסמך מדינה, בכתב ערבי. כנראה דו'ח, עצומה או המלצה מטלחה אל-קבטי לאציל, כנראה בקהיר. תיארוך: כנראה תקופת האיובים. הנמען מתבקש לדאוג לנושא ולשלושה אחרים ולכל חבריהם. בגב רישומים ואולי טיוטת עצומה.
